description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered wooden shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a traditional, aged appearance. The cabin features a small, covered side porch supported by simple wooden posts, adding to its rural charm. There are a few small, rectangular windows and a single main door, both simply framed and unadorned. The roof is adorned with decorative wooden crossbeams at the ridge, enhancing its traditional architectural style. The overall structure is compact and sturdy, suitable for a rural or forested setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, weathered wood siding, and a small covered side porch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the gable roof and the attached side porch structure.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the triangular gable, decorative ridge crossbeams, and a small window on the wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main entrance door, two small windows, and the porch extending from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view with the gable end, decorative roof details, and a clear view of the porch's roof and support posts.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with wooden shingles and decorative ridge crossbeams
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with two small rectangular windows on the front facade and one small window on the gable end
attribute_door_placement: single main door on the front facade, offset to the left beneath the porch
